Constraint: actor_user_id must reference an existing user
Notes: Use system user for automated/background events.

Constraint: event_name must be present
occurred_at must be present
event_details defaults to {}
audit rows should be append-only
permission_key must be unique
permission_key format should be dot-separated
permission_group must be present
role_key must be unique
name must be present
system roles should not be deleted through normal UI
inactive roles should not be newly assigned
Notes: Existing assignments may remain for history.

Constraint: role_id, permission_id must be unique
store_number must be unique
Notes: Store as string for leading zeroes.

Constraint: store_number should be numeric-only
Notes: If that remains a business rule.

Constraint: country_code should be uppercase two-character code
region_code should be uppercase where present
email should be normalized lowercase
website_url should include protocol
time_zone should be valid
username must be unique after normalization
Notes: Choose uppercase or lowercase and apply consistently.

Constraint: user_type must be controlled
invalid_login_attempts >= 0
interactive users require password_digest
system user must have interactive_login_enabled = false
inactive users cannot log in
PIN unlock is only for existing locked sessions
Notes: PIN cannot be used for initial login or permission escalation.

Constraint: scope_type must be controlled
if scope_type = 'global', store_id must be null
if scope_type = 'store', store_id must be present
duplicate active assignments should not be allowed
Notes: Use partial unique indexes if using PostgreSQL.

Constraint: inactive roles should not be newly assigned
workstation_type must be controlled
workstation_number should be numeric-only
workstation_number must be unique within store
workstation_code should be generated consistently
inactive workstations cannot be assigned to browsers/sessions
status must be controlled
Notes: Allowed: active, locked, ended, expired, force_ended.

Constraint: session_token_digest must be unique
last_activity_at must be present
locked_at should be present when status is locked
ended_at should be present when status is terminal
ended_by_user_id should be present when status is force_ended
terminal sessions should not return to active
assignment_token_digest must be unique
revoked assignments cannot be used for new sessions
Notes: revoked_at must be null for active assignment.

Constraint: assigned workstation must be active when creating assignment
browser cookie should store only raw token
name must be present and globally unique
Notes: Tax categories are global classification records.

Constraint: short_name must be present and globally unique
inactive tax categories cannot be assigned as new category defaults
store_id must reference an existing store
name must be unique within store
Notes: Prevents duplicate store tax rate names.

Constraint: short_name must be unique within store
tax_identifier must be unique within store
tax_identifier should be normalized uppercase
tax_rate_bps must be present
Notes: Store tax rates must have an explicit rate.

Constraint: tax_rate_bps >= 0
tax_rate_bps <= 10000
Notes: Recommended unless rates above 100% must be supported.

Constraint: inactive rates cannot be used in new tax mappings
store_id must reference an existing store
tax_category_id must reference an existing tax category
store_tax_rate_id must reference an existing store tax rate
store_tax_rate_id must belong to the same store_id
effective_on must be present
Notes: Effective-dated mapping requires a start date.

Constraint: ends_on must be null or greater than/equal to effective_on
no overlapping active mappings for same store/tax category/date
Notes: Prevents ambiguous tax lookup. Enforce in model/service logic or PostgreSQL exclusion constraint later.

Constraint: active tax lookup must return exactly one rate
Notes: Future POS should fail loudly if zero or multiple mappings exist.

Constraint: department_number must be present and unique
department_number must match ^[0-9]{3}$
name must be present and unique
short_name must be present and unique
inactive departments cannot be assigned to new categories
department_id must reference an existing department
name must be unique within department
Notes: Allows same category name in different departments if needed.

Constraint: short_name must be unique within department
Notes: Prevents ambiguous short labels within department.

Constraint: default_tax_category_id must reference an existing tax category
Notes: Required default for future sellable items.

Constraint: inactive departments cannot be selected for new categories
inactive tax categories cannot be selected as new defaults
default_pricing_model must be controlled when present
default_margin_target_bps must be null or between 0 and 10000
default_supplier_discount_bps must be null or between 0 and 10000
format_key must be present and unique
name must be present
short_name must be present
inactive formats cannot be assigned to new catalog items
catalog_item_type must be controlled
Notes: Allowed values: book, calendar, periodical, recorded_music, sideline, videorecording, audiobook, ebook, map, game, gift, other.

Constraint: title must be present
format_id must reference an active format for new records
Notes: Existing records may retain inactive formats.

Constraint: publication_status must be controlled
publication_frequency must be controlled when present
dimension_units must be controlled when present
weight_units must be controlled when present
year must be null or match ^[0-9]{4}$
catalog item must have at least one active identifier
Notes: Enforce in catalog item service/model logic.

Constraint: catalog item must have exactly one active primary identifier
Notes: Enforce with service plus partial unique index on identifiers.

Constraint: catalog_item_id must reference an existing catalog item
identifier_type must be controlled
Notes: Allowed values: isbn10, isbn13, ean, upc, gtin, publisher_number, local.

Constraint: identifier_value must be present
normalized_identifier must be present
standard identifiers normalize to digits only except ISBN-10 terminal X
ISBN/UPC/EAN/GTIN check digits are validated
Notes: Invalid values may be saved with warning.

Constraint: ISBN-10 creates non-primary ISBN-10 plus generated primary ISBN-13
Notes: ISBN-13 uses 978 prefix and recalculated check digit.

Constraint: publisher numbers preserve display value but normalize alphanumeric uppercase
publisher numbers are not globally unique by themselves
Notes: Searchable, but uniqueness should not be enforced globally.

Constraint: local identifiers must be unique
exactly one active primary identifier per catalog item
Notes: Use partial unique index and service logic.

Constraint: name must be present
short_name must be present and unique
parent_id must reference an existing display location when present
inactive display locations cannot be assigned to new products/variants
display_location_id must reference an existing display location
store_id must reference an existing store
store_id, display_location_id must be unique
Notes: Prevents duplicate activation in same store.

Constraint: linear_feet >= 0
sku must be present and unique
catalog-linked product SKU defaults from catalog primary identifier
Notes: Unless explicitly overridden by authorized user.

Constraint: non-catalog product SKU must be manual or generated
name must be present
catalog-linked product name defaults from catalog title
non-catalog product name is user-entered
product_type must be controlled
Notes: Allowed values: physical, digital, service, non_inventory, financial.

Constraint: variation_type must be controlled
Notes: Allowed values: standard, conditional, variable, matrix.

Constraint: list_price_cents >= 0
product is not sellable until at least one active variant exists
product SKU changes are permission-controlled and audited
Notes: Should be restricted after variants/history exist.

Constraint: condition_key must be present and unique
short_name must be present and unique
sku_component is nullable but unique when present
sku_component normalizes uppercase
default_list_price_factor_bps must be between 0 and 10000
inactive conditions cannot be assigned to new variants
product_id must reference an existing product
sku must be present and unique
category_id must reference an existing category
inactive categories cannot be assigned to new variants
selling_price_cents >= 0
pricing_model_override must be controlled when present
inventory_behavior must be controlled
Notes: Allowed values: standard_physical, digital_asset, drop_ship, composite_recipe, capacitated_service, pure_financial, non_inventory.

Constraint: new/default variant SKU equals product SKU
Notes: New condition has null SKU component.

Constraint: condition variant SKU appends condition SKU component
variable variant SKU appends attribute 1 SKU component
matrix variant SKU appends attribute 1 and attribute 2 SKU components
product may have at most one unsuffixed variant
variant name is generated from product name plus condition/attributes unless overridden
name must be present
parent_vendor_id must reference an existing vendor when present
default_pricing_model must be controlled when present
default_margin_target_bps must be null or between 0 and 10000
default_supplier_discount_bps must be null or between 0 and 10000
inactive vendors cannot be assigned to new future sourcing records
